notes: Game starts up, first splash screen is normal; from the second splash onwards you can only see a small portion of the game. Buttons are not visible/reachable so game cannot be played.
title: Mind's Eye: Secrets of the Forgotten

notes: Game launches in Steam but only a small part of the screen is visible. I tried launching the game with PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% but it made no difference. I then launched the game via Lutris using ge-protonified-nofshack-4.9-x86_64 as the runner. The game runs perfectly now!
title: Mind's Eye: Secrets of the Forgotten
